_doc.about: Documentation for header banner JSON. This object is ignored by the app; only 'headers' is used.

fields.id: Unique string identifier for the header
fields.imageUrl: Image URL for the banner background. Can be absolute or relative (e.g., 'banners/header.png').
fields.destinationUrl: URL to open when the banner is tapped
fields.title: Primary text shown on the banner (optional)
fields.subtitle: Secondary text shown on the banner (optional)
fields.titleFontFamily: Font family key loaded in app (e.g., 'Figtree')
fields.titleOpacity: Number between 0 and 1 for title opacity (e.g., 1)
fields.subtitleOpacity: Number between 0 and 1 for subtitle opacity (e.g., 0.9)

exampleHeader.title: Orbyt
exampleHeader.subtitle: a new video app for bluesky
